title: AXCalendar
description: AXCalendar is an abstract base class that defines the interface for calendar implementations. It provides methods for date calculations and manipulations specific to different calendar systems.

sections.title: Type Definition
sections.description: AXCalendar is an abstract base class that represents a calendar system with methods for date calculations and manipulations.

props.name: weekend
props.description: Returns an array of weekend day numbers (0-6, where 0 is Sunday).

props.name: weekdays
props.description: Returns an array of weekday numbers in the calendar's week order.

methods.name: name
methods.description: Returns the name of the calendar system (e.g., 'gregorian', 'persian', 'islamic').

methods.name: dayOfMonth
methods.description: Returns the day of the month (1-31) for the given date.

methods.name: dayOfYear
methods.description: Returns the day of the year (1-365/366) for the given date.

methods.name: dayOfWeek
methods.description: Returns the day of the week (1-7) for the given date.

methods.name: monthOfYear
methods.description: Returns the month of the year (1-12) for the given date.

methods.name: weekOfYear
methods.description: Returns the week of the year (1-52/53) for the given date.

methods.name: year
methods.description: Returns the year for the given date.

methods.name: add
methods.description: Adds a specified amount of time units to the given date and returns a new AXDateTime instance.
methods.content: abstract add(date: Date, unit: TimeUnit, amount: number): AXDateTime;

methods.name: set
methods.description: Sets a specific time unit to a given value and returns a new AXDateTime instance.
methods.content: abstract set(date: Date, unit: TimeUnit, value: number): AXDateTime;

methods.name: startOf
methods.description: Returns the start of the specified time unit for the given date.
methods.content: abstract startOf(date: Date, unit: TimeUnit): AXDateTime;

methods.name: endOf
methods.description: Returns the end of the specified time unit for the given date.
methods.content: abstract endOf(date: Date, unit: TimeUnit): AXDateTime;

methods.name: create
methods.description: Creates a new AXDateTime instance from an AXDateValue object.

methods.name: parse
methods.description: Parses a date string and returns a new AXDateTime instance.
